fails_to_prove_belgian_nationality.name: fails_to_prove_belgian_nationality
fails_to_prove_belgian_nationality.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

lacks_union_citizenship.name: lacks_union_citizenship
lacks_union_citizenship.description: The person is not a citizen of the Union.

not_covered_by_free_movement_law.name: not_covered_by_free_movement_law
not_covered_by_free_movement_law.description: The person is not covered by Community free movement law.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

does_not_satisfy_entry_or_stay_condition.name: does_not_satisfy_entry_or_stay_conditions
does_not_satisfy_entry_or_stay_condition.description: The person does not or no longer satisfies the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsible_member_state_proc.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_procedure
subject_to_responsible_member_state_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the member state responsible for an international protection request.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed.

all_case_circumstances_considered.name: all_case_circumstances_considered
all_case_circumstances_considered.description: All circumstances specific to the person's case have been considered.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: After illegal entry or during illegal stay, the person did not submit a residence application.

late_international_protection_request.name: late_international_protection_request
late_international_protection_request.description: The person did not make an international protection request within the statutory time limit.

used_false_or_misleading_information.name: used_false_or_misleading_information
used_false_or_misleading_information.description: The person used false or misleading information in a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_forged_documents.name: used_false_or_forged_documents
used_false_or_forged_documents.description: The person used false or forged documents in a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means.name: committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means
committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_aut.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_authorities
failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_aut.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for immigration rules.

stated_unwilling_to_comply_with_listed_m.name: stated_unwilling_to_comply_with_listed_measure
stated_unwilling_to_comply_with_listed_m.description: The person made clear an unwillingness to comply with a listed transfer, refusal, removal, entry-ban, less coercive, restrictive, public-order, national-security, or equivalent measure.

failed_to_comply_with_listed_measure.name: failed_to_comply_with_listed_measure
failed_to_comply_with_listed_measure.description: The person has already failed to comply with a listed transfer, refusal, removal, entry-ban, less coercive, restrictive, public-order, national-security, or equivalent measure.

subject_to_unsuspended_entry_ban.name: subject_to_unsuspended_entry_ban
subject_to_unsuspended_entry_ban.description: The person is subject to an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

submitted_new_application_immediately_af.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_refusal_or_measure
submitted_new_application_immediately_af.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refusal, end-of-stay decision, refusal-of-entry measure, pushback measure, or removal measure.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsi.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsible_state_when_questioned
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsi.description: When questioned on the point, the person concealed having previously given fingerprints in another state bound by the rules for determining the responsible state for an international protection request.

multiple_applications_with_negative_or_n.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_or_no_title_results
multiple_applications_with_negative_or_n.description: The person submitted multiple international protection requests or residence applications that resulted in negative decisions or did not lead to a residence title.

concealed_prior_protection_request_in_re.name: concealed_prior_protection_request_in_responsible_state_when_questioned
concealed_prior_protection_request_in_re.description: When questioned on the point, the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by the rules for determining the responsible state.

came_for_purpose_other_than_application_.name: came_for_purpose_other_than_application_purpose
came_for_purpose_other_than_application_.description: The person declared, or the file shows, that the person came for purposes other than those of the international protection request or residence application.

fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal.name: fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal.description: The person is subject to a fine for lodging a manifestly unlawful appeal before the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

has_valid_travel_passport_or_identity_do.name: has_valid_travel_passport_or_identity_document
has_valid_travel_passport_or_identity_do.description: The person possesses a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

recognized_national_with_travel_pass_wil.name: recognized_national_with_travel_pass_willingness
recognized_national_with_travel_pass_wil.description: The person has been recognized as a national by the national authority of the person's country, which declared willingness to issue a travel pass.

nationality_category_allows_minister_tra.name: nationality_category_allows_minister_travel_pass
nationality_category_allows_minister_tra.description: The person falls within a nationality category for which the minister can issue a travel pass.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is legally classified as a foreigner.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is legally classified as a third-country national.

has_illegal_stay.name: has_illegal_stay
has_illegal_stay.description: The person is legally in illegal stay on the territory.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The person is legally classified as an identified foreigner.

subject_to_absconding_relevant_procedure.name: subject_to_absconding_relevant_procedure
subject_to_absconding_relevant_procedure.description: The person is subject to a procedure relevant to assessing risk of absconding.

criterion_no_application_or_late_request.name: criterion_no_application_or_late_request_met
criterion_no_application_or_late_request.description: The objective criterion concerning no residence application after illegal entry or stay, or a late international protection request, is met.

criterion_false_info_documents_fraud_met.name: criterion_false_info_documents_fraud_met
criterion_false_info_documents_fraud_met.description: The objective criterion concerning false or misleading information, false or forged documents, fraud, or unlawful means is met.

criterion_non_cooperation_met.name: criterion_non_cooperation_met
criterion_non_cooperation_met.description: The objective criterion concerning non-cooperation with immigration authorities is met.

criterion_non_compliance_measure_met.name: criterion_non_compliance_measure_met
criterion_non_compliance_measure_met.description: The objective criterion concerning unwillingness or failure to comply with a listed measure is met.

criterion_entry_ban_met.name: criterion_entry_ban_met
criterion_entry_ban_met.description: The objective criterion concerning an unsuspended entry ban is met.

criterion_new_application_after_refusal_.name: criterion_new_application_after_refusal_or_measure_met
criterion_new_application_after_refusal_.description: The objective criterion concerning a new application immediately after a refusal decision or measure is met.

criterion_concealed_prior_fingerprints_m.name: criterion_concealed_prior_fingerprints_met
criterion_concealed_prior_fingerprints_m.description: The objective criterion concerning concealed prior fingerprints in another responsible-state-rule state is met.

criterion_multiple_applications_negative.name: criterion_multiple_applications_negative_or_no_title_met
criterion_multiple_applications_negative.description: The objective criterion concerning multiple applications with negative decisions or no residence title is met.

criterion_concealed_prior_protection_req.name: criterion_concealed_prior_protection_request_met
criterion_concealed_prior_protection_req.description: The objective criterion concerning concealed prior international protection request in another responsible-state-rule state is met.

criterion_other_purpose_met.name: criterion_other_purpose_met
criterion_other_purpose_met.description: The objective criterion concerning coming for purposes other than the application purpose is met.

criterion_manifestly_unlawful_appeal_fin.name: criterion_manifestly_unlawful_appeal_fine_met
criterion_manifestly_unlawful_appeal_fin.description: The objective criterion concerning a fine for a manifestly unlawful appeal is met.

one_or_more_objective_absconding_criteri.name: one_or_more_objective_absconding_criteria_met
one_or_more_objective_absconding_criteri.description: At least one listed objective criterion for risk of absconding is met for the person.

has_actual_real_risk_of_absconding.name: has_actual_real_risk_of_absconding
has_actual_real_risk_of_absconding.description: The person has an actual and real legal risk of absconding.
